subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and immovable in the Covenant! The news of the martyrdom of His Holiness Mullá Ṣádiq, like a brilliant light, hath illumined the horizons of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ بر عهد و پیمان خبر شهادت حضرت ملا صادق چون نور بازغ آفاق وجود را
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
